subcodes.first_line: The Most Exalted Pen beareth witness to thy devotion and attentiveness. Praise be unto God for this supreme testimony which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قلم اعلی شهادت میدهد بر اقبال و توجه آنجناب الحمد لله باین شهادت کبری که
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @high station of the true believer, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
